name_cn:
『Burberry』
Burberry's exquisite crossbody bag, crafted from grained leather and Vintage check, featuring a logo-engraved button. Includes a detachable strap with jacquard-woven brand logo. Easily transforms into a shoulder bag or clutch. 25 x 8.5 x 18cm, 1208
